Label: Anatomical Entity
Description: An anatomical structure or body part.

Label: Biological Process
Description: A biological process.

Label: Chemical Entity
Description: A chemical substance or entity.

Label: Chemical Exposure
Description: An exposure to a chemical, represented as a risk or contributing factor for disease.

Label: Disease
Description: A rare disease or disorder, harmonized across MONDO, Orphanet/ORDO, OMIM, and UMLS identifiers.

Label: Drug
Description: A drug or pharmaceutical agent used to treat disease.

Label: Exposure Event
Description: An exposure event associated with disease.

Label: Gene
Description: A gene associated with disease, identified by its NCBI Gene identifier.

Label: Phenotypic Feature
Description: A phenotype or clinical feature, such as a sign, symptom, mode of inheritance, or onset (HPO terms).

Label: Sequence Variant
Description: A genomic sequence variant.

Label: Treatment
Description: A treatment or therapeutic intervention.

Label: comment
Description: A descriptive comment or definition for an entity.

Label: label
Description: A human-readable label for an entity.

Label: versionInfo
Description: Version information for the knowledge graph.

Label: prefLabel
Description: The preferred human-readable label for an entity.

Label: Associated With
Description: A general association between a disease and a related entity such as a treatment.

Label: category
Description: The Biolink category assigned to an entity.

Label: Causes Condition
Description: Relates a variant to the disease it causes.

Label: Contraindicated For
Description: Indicates a drug or treatment that is contraindicated for a disease.

Label: Contributes To
Description: Relates a contributing factor, such as a chemical exposure or gene, to a disease.

Label: Disease Has Location
Description: Relates a disease to the anatomical structure or biological process where it manifests.

Label: Gene Associated With Condition
Description: Relates a gene to a disease condition.

Label: Genetic Association
Description: A genetic association between a disease and a gene.

Label: Has Gene
Description: Relates a variant to its gene.

Label: Has Mode Of Inheritance
Description: Relates a disease to its mode of inheritance (an HPO inheritance term).

Label: Has Onset
Description: Relates a disease to its age or type of onset.

Label: Has Phenotype
Description: Relates a disease to its associated phenotypes.

Label: id
Description: The compact identifier (CURIE) of an entity.

Label: Prevented By
Description: Relates a disease to a treatment that prevents it.

Label: Related To
Description: A general association between entities.

Label: Subclass Of
Description: Indicates a hierarchical relationship between diseases.

Label: Treats
Description: Relates a drug to the disease it treats.
